parents.subject: LU-19806 tests: fix sanity-quota FSNAME usage

commit.subject: LU-19962 mgc: don't reference MGC without export
commit.message:
LU-19962 mgc: don't reference MGC without export

lustre_start_mgc() can leave MGC without cl_mgc_mgsexp
and it can be referenced by another mount process so
it will use MGC which has no export causing either
-ENODEV errors or crashes

Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ia9a82c8b82406eb378c45e4bc97ad6bbdf363fa6
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/64503
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
